title: Smaller Golden Carrot
description: A resource pack that reduces the size of the golden carrot for a cleaner visual experience.
body:
This is a simple resource pack that features a smaller golden carrot. Originally created for personal use, I thought others might find it useful, so I'm sharing it here. Enjoy!

![Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0e759321c097f441ec8f90fdced3157bdb9e9be.jpeg)
